results.title: LLM Circuit Analyses Are Consistent Across Training and Scale
results.snippet: Tracks how circuits emerge and evolve across 300 billion tokens of LLM training in 70M-2.8B param models; task abilities emerge consistently at similar token counts across scale.

results.title: Curriculum Learning for LLM Pretraining: Analysis of Learning Dynamics
results.snippet: Early learning phase (~10^4 steps) where representations change rapidly; critical learning phase (~10^5 steps) where most benchmark improvements occur and representations stabilize; curricula affect both phases.

results.title: Circuit Tracing in Vision-Language Models
results.snippet: Internal mechanism analysis of multimodal LLM thinking through circuit tracing.

results.title: CircuitLM Multi-Agent LLM-Aided Design
results.snippet: LLM multi-agent framework for circuit schematic generation; unrelated.

results.title: Dissecting Spatiotemporal Visual Semantics with Circuit
results.snippet: Visual semantic circuit analysis in multimodal LLM.
